report.project_summary:
This rectangular floor plan contains 2 rooms with a total area of 11.4 square meters. The structural analysis identified 10 load-bearing walls and 4 partition walls.

The overall structural integrity score is 0% with 0 critical issues and 10 warnings requiring attention. The maximum span of 3.1m is within acceptable limits.

The estimated construction cost is ₹261,044 (₹22,966/sqm), representing a potential savings of ₹-44,166 compared to premium material options.

element_explanations.recommendation_text: Fly Ash Brick (9.0 MPa compressive strength, ₹440.0/sqm) is recommended for this partition. Selected over AAC Block (Autoclaved) (4.0 MPa, ₹550.0/sqm), saving ₹110/sqm.
element_explanations.tradeoff_summary: Score: 0.72. Key factors: Exterior wall - weather exposure, Part of continuous load path.

element_explanations.recommendation_text: Steel Frame (250.0 MPa compressive strength, ₹4000.0/sqm) is recommended for this exterior_load_bearing. Chosen over Precast Concrete Panel (Residential) (25.0 MPa) for better structural performance.
element_explanations.tradeoff_summary: Score: 0.67. Key factors: Exterior wall - weather exposure, Load-bearing - strength priority.

report.overall_assessment:
Based on the comprehensive analysis, this floor plan demonstrates acceptable structural integrity. The design appears suitable for residential construction with the recommended materials.

Key recommendations: Address the 10 identified warnings, consider the 2 optimization suggestions for potential cost savings, and ensure proper material specifications during construction.
report.methodology_notes: Analysis performed using VLM+CV fusion parsing, graph-based geometry analysis, and multi-criteria material optimization. (Mock mode - LLM explanations disabled)
limitations: Scale detection accuracy depends on image quality
Regional material cost variations not accounted for
Professional structural review recommended for construction
